transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling HarborPoint Care Line, this is Ava. What's going on today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I've had a really bad headache since yesterday and now my vision's a little blurry.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Okay, I want to check a few things quickly. Any weakness, numbness, or trouble speaking?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: No, none of that. Just the headache and blurry vision, and some nausea.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Have you had any fever, neck stiffness, or recent head injury?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: No fever, no injury. My neck feels fine too.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Given the sudden blurry vision with a severe headache, I'd like you to be seen today rather than wait. Can you get to urgent care this afternoon?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Yeah, there's one near my house. I can go in the next hour.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Good. If your vision worsens, you get weakness, or the headache becomes the worst you've ever had, go straight to the ER instead.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Understood. I'll head to urgent care now.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I'll note this visit in your file, Mr. Delgado. Feel better soon, and call back if anything changes.
